text: International Society for Pharmacoepidemiology (ISPE) - International Society for Pharmacoepidemiology 5th Annual African Regional Interest Group Meeting ISPE has created a page to provide in-depth information about the presenters and topics being shared in the coming months. You can also submit your own webinar proposals and access previous sessions.
Please take the time to explore and register for the following presentations.

The ETIE framework: Leveraging determinants of health and equity in pharmacoepidemiology Avoiding Immortal Time in Studies of Medication Use During Pregnancy When: June 3, 2026, 9 am EDT/3 pm CEST/10 pm JST The Fall of Vioxx (rofecoxib) and the Birth of Modern Pharmacoepidemiology When: June 25, 2026, 9:00 am EDT/3 pm CEST As ISPE brings the 2024-2029 strategic plan to life, a dashboard will be published regularly to provide transparency and updates about the organization's progress.

The plan itself is available and the well-coordinated next steps are underway. at the Annual Meeting, which included the ISPE Networking Corner and the New Member and Early Career Luncheon. Please consider joining and supporting this peer-to-peer mentoring program to nurture the community within ISPE.

The session videos captured at the Annual Meeting are available to members in the Education Center. Simply navigate to the IPCE Archives and select the Annual Meeting to all the information that is available thanks to the dedication of our presenters. Share your suggestions for newsletter and social media content. Connect with peers, share ideas, and get involved.
